§6Soldering Station§f

§aCreate circuits and advanced electronic components.§f

The §bSoldering Station§f enables the production of electronic circuits. Using vacuum tubes, capacitors, lead wires, and printed circuit boards, you can solder together various circuit boards.

§6Crafting§f:
Made at the Assembly Machine using:
§b• Cast Steel Plates§f
§b• Copper Coils§f
§b• Tungsten Bolts§f
§b• Vacuum Tubes§f

§6Operation§f:
Insert the required components into the soldering station. It will consume power to solder them into completed circuits. The first circuit you will make is the §bAnalog Circuit Board§f.

§6Key Products§f:
§b• Analog Circuit Board§f: Basic circuits
§b• Advanced Circuits§f: For higher-tier machines

§eTip§f: The soldering station is the gateway to the electrical age. It unlocks the chemical plant, arc welder, and all advanced electronics.
